title: LANMU 2-Pack Pressure Relief Device for Triton,Pressure Relief Device PRD with Disc Seals Cover Valve Shower Spares Parts for Triton Electric Showers(Replace of 82800450)
features: Pressure Relief Device for Triton:This device ​is made of ABS and silicone material,Complete PRD component design(including rubber cover).Avoid spraying water when you are using power shower
New Upgrade:This pressure relief device adopts a seal cover design, not only will not leak, but also will burst for protection when the pressure of your showers is too high,more safe

Easy to Install: This shower pressure relief valve is customized design for triton electric shower.Just remove your old pressure relief device and put new PRD replacement in its place,does not leak and protect your triton shower

Widely Compatible with: Our pressure relief device is compatible with triton electric showers, for Triton Agio Electric Shower, Triton Alicante, Triton Amber -triton Aquablast, Triton Aquastorm, Triton Aquasurge, Triton Aquatronic 1 Plus,Triton Aspirante, Triton Aspirante Electric, Triton Aspirante Millenium, Triton Aspirante Topaz, Triton Aspirante Xr, Triton Belize, Triton Bezique 2, Triton Biarritz 2, Triton Biscay 2 (For more models, please refer to our description below)
Package Including:2*Pressure Relief Device,2*Seal Covers,4*Replacement Screws
description: Product Description Compatible With Triton Electric Showers (The Model Number As Follows: Triton Agio Electric Shower/Triton Alicante/Triton Amber 3 Triton Aquablast Triton Aquastorm/Triton Aquasurge Triton Aquatronic 1 Plus/Triton Aquatronic 4 Ultra Triton Aquatronic 4 Plus/Triton Aspirante/Triton Aspirante Electric Triton Aspirante Millenium/Triton Aspirante Topaz Triton Aspirante XrTriton Belize/Triton Bezique 2/Triton Biarritz 2 Triton Biscay 2/Triton Cara/Triton Carino/Triton Caselona Triton Caslona 2/Triton Caslona 3/Triton Collections Triton Colourwave/Triton Desire/Triton Enchant/Triton Enlight Triton Enrich/Triton Entice/Triton Excite/Triton Excite Eco Triton Forte/Triton Inscriptions/Triton Ivory 2/Triton Ivory 3 Triton Ivory 4 Mk2/Triton Jade 2/Triton Jade 3/Triton Jewel Triton Kito/Triton Madrid 2/Triton Marbella/Triton Millenium Triton Millenium Care/Triton Opal 2/Triton Opal 3/Triton Osiris Triton Passion/Triton Perluso/Triton Pietra/Triton Prostyle Plus Triton Rally/Triton Rapide 2 Plus/Triton Rapide 3/Triton Rapide 3 Plus Triton Rapide 4 Plus/Triton Rapide R1/Triton Rapide R2 Triton Rapide R3/Triton Safeguard/Triton Safeguard Care Triton Safeguard Care Pumped/Triton Safeguard Plus Triton Safeguard Pumped/Triton Salsa Mk2/Triton Sambada Triton Serano/Triton Seville/Triton Shannon/Triton Spellbind Triton T70/Triton T100XR/Triton T80/Triton T80XR
